creator: ota@j.email.ne.jp
text:
According to http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/net/freeradius-devel/Attic/Makefile, files were removed.  However, its entry is still in http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/net/Makefile?rev=1.1967.

Fix: 

Delete "SUBDIR += freeradius-devel" from net/Makefile.
